title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete UI
scenario: Account tab under General settings does not display delete icon below Log out button as per Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the General settings menu (gear icon).
Select the Account tab from the General settings list.
Scroll down to locate the Log out button.
Observe the area directly below the Log out button.
expected: A delete icon is displayed below the Log out button, matching the Figma design specifications.
